subcodes.first_line: Throughout the centuries and ages, the people of Persia, both divines and others, have, according to their own belief, clung to truth and voiced the truth, and in [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: در قرون و اعصار اهل ایران از علما و غیرهم علی زعمهم بحق متمسک و بحق ناطق و در
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people
